chapter_title.en: Chapter 40 – The Gambling and the Plundering

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/87)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/87)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الصِّبْيَانُ يَلْعَبُونَ بِالْجَوْزِ وَ الْبَيْضِ وَ يُقَامِرُونَ فَقَالَ لَا تَأْكُلْ مِنْهُ فَإِنَّهُ حَرَامٌ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad Al Nahdy, from Yaqoub Bin Yazeed, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The children are playing with the walnuts and the eggs and are gambling (with these)’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not eat from it, for it is Prohibited’.
en.sarwar: 9. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Al-Washsha” who has said the following: “I once heard abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘Al-Maysir is gambling.’”
